query:
INSERT INTO grocery_trips (trip_date, store_name, total_spent, notes)
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
            ON CONFLICT (trip_date, store_name)
            DO UPDATE SET
                total_spent = EXCLUDED.total_spent,
                notes = EXCLUDED.notes,
                updated_at = NOW()
            RETURNING id, (xmax = 0) as "was_created!"
